content.body: What's the status of ShadowRealm these days? I see that the repository hasn't been updated for over a year.

* Still, I am grateful for this discussion, I learned a ton of internal functionality and don’t regret at least trying. 
I consider these ideas closed from now on. (Actually, look below). Well, I tried.
